generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering angle adjustments via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for the autonomous vehicle's physical controls"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for speed control of the autonomous vehicle chassis"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's environment using Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures depth-sensed imagery for environmental perception using Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously measures ego vehicle speed (m/s) via embedded sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously measures steering angle (degrees) via embedded sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures vehicle position (x,y,z) coordinates"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Generated from LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX) and depth camera (Intel D435i) data, processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
]

instance VehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Includes speed (m/s), steering angle (degrees), and position (x,y,z) of the ego vehicle"
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implemented per ISO 15622 (Performance Class I), with speed computation based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point clouds via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Aggregates object tracks and ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) into structured data streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Aligns message types and performs unit conversions for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance CloudACCProcessing : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processes ACC control logic offloaded from onboard hardware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SQLDatabaseObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of object tracks stored in SQL database for historical reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance SQLDatabaseVehicleState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of vehicle state stored in SQL database for historical reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, PositionData
]

instance HistoricalTrackingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of object tracks and vehicle state stored in SQL database for historical reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SQLDatabaseObjectTracks, SQLDatabaseVehicleState
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projections of future driving paths generated from current vehicle state and object tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, VehicleSpeedData
]

instance ControlCommands : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated control commands for ACC system based on ACC control logic and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCControlLogic
]

instance ACCPerformanceReport : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated reports of ACC system performance metrics and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HistoricalTrackingData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Facilitates real-time data fusion and communication between sensors and the DT system via ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, CloudACCProcessing
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External storage for historical tracking and reporting of object tracks and vehicle state data"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrin : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Vehicle onboard hardware platform (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for real-time processing of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonCloud : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud platform for offloading ACC control logic from resource-constrained ECU"
    DTDFVocab:enables CloudACCProcessing
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development SDK for NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano programming environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development language for rapid prototyping of data processing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Language for ROS2 node lifecycle management and system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, CloudACCProcessing
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation tools for complex systems including point cloud clustering and control logic validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel, ACCControlLogic
]

instance OPCUA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation protocol for manufacturing flexibility and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance ROS2MessageSerialization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message serialization format for inter-entity communication in ROS2 environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance 3DCADIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual prototyping and validation platform for ACC system testing against real-world scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Virtual Cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirtualCockpitInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano to cloud platform for distributed processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides TestScenarioExecution
]

instance RemoteManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enable/disable of ACC, adjustment of desired speed, and emergency braking via Control Panel UI"
]

instance SimulationValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides TestScenarioExecution, ValidationReporting
]

instance DataMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state for optimization and troubleshooting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VirtualCockpitInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state and projected driving paths for operational monitoring"
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates historical performance reports from stored tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of desired speed for ACC system via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TestScenarioExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes ACC system testing scenarios in simulated environments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationReporting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates validation reports comparing simulated and real-world ACC performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state for optimization purposes (fuel economy, performance tuning)"
]

instance TroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data collection and analysis for developer diagnostics during system development"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SteeringServoActuator, MotorActuator,
        HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleSpeedSensor,
        SteeringAngleSensor, PositionSensor, ROS2Middleware,
        NVIDIAJetsonOrin
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE,
        CloudACCProcessing, ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase,
        NVIDIAJetpackSDK, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink,
        OPCUA, ROS2MessageSerialization, 3DCADIntegration
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interactions include:
  - **ACC Controlling FE**: Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622, Performance Class I ACC) and sends commands to the vehicle’s actuators.
  - **Actuation FE**: Converts speed commands into motor voltage signals for the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**.
  - **Emergency braking**: Implemented via direct command injection to the vehicle’s steering/speed control system.
  - **Latency constraints**: End-to-end latency ≤ **100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185), with **clock synchronization accuracy ≤ 100 ms** for distributed systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on the following time scales:
  - **Real-Time Processing**: Data collection and object tracking occur at **perception cycle rates** (not explicitly quantified but inferred as **<100 ms latency** per ISO 3GPP 22.185).
  - **Data Storage**: Ego vehicle state and object tracks are stored in a **SQL database** externally to the vehicle, with no explicit frequency mentioned but assumed to align with real-time monitoring needs.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization between the **Physical Twin Entity** and **Digital Twin Entity** is maintained to **±100 ms accuracy**, enabling coordinated event handling."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is structured as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing (LiDAR, cameras, vehicle state)** and **actuation (motor, steering)** components, with a departure from ISO 23247 by including general automotive functionality.
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages **data collection, storage, and ACC control logic**, with a split into **lightweight real-time** (for timesensitive tasks) and **offline** components (for computation-intensive tasks).
    3. **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (for monitoring) and **Control Panel FE** (for remote management).
    4. **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data alignment.
  - **Orchestration**: Entities communicate via **ROS2 (intra-entity) and Wi-Fi (inter-entity)**, with **Data Translation FE** ensuring message compatibility."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans the following lifecycle stages:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** and **ADAS system validation** via simulation (MATLAB/Simulink, ROS2).
  2. **Development Phase**: Enables **remote testing and troubleshooting** of ACC via data collection and monitoring.
  3. **Operational Phase**: Provides **real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring** of the autonomous vehicle (e.g., predictive maintenance for brake systems, motor health). The DT covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical twin, with fidelity adjusted for real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **ACC Control Logic**: Validated against **ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)** for safety and compliance.
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: Latency tested to **≤100 ms** (3GPP 22.185).
  - **Validation**:
    - **Cyber-Physical Experimentation**: Used for **ADAS system validation** via simulation (MATLAB/Simulink, ROS2).
    - **Data Accuracy**: LiDAR and camera data processed via **DBSCAN/Kalman filtering** for reliable object tracking.
  - **Uncertainty Management**:
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for event ordering.
    - **Data Storage**: SQL database ensures historical data integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin technical connection includes:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2 (intra-entity)**: For component communication within the vehicle.
    - **Wi-Fi (inter-entity)**: For cloud-based computation offloading and remote management.
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - **ISO 23247 (Reference Architecture)**: Adopted for entity-based design.
    - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: Standardized middleware for real-time data exchange.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185) for real-time control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard vehicle) for real-time processing.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **cloud infrastructure** for computation offloading (e.g., ACC control logic).
  - **User Entity**: Accessible via **remote web interface** (Control Panel UI) for monitoring/management.
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database (not specified) for historical tracking and reporting."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves:
  - **General Automotive Context**: Services align with broader automotive DT applications (e.g., **remote control**, **cloud-based fleet coordination** as mentioned in the abstract).
  - **V2V Communication**: Latency constraints (≤100 ms) support **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Fleet Coordination**: Not explicitly demonstrated in the case study but referenced as a broader interest in the abstract."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for DT development (adapted for automotive).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control standards (Performance Class I).
  - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: Standard middleware for real-time communication.
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication latency requirements (≤100 ms)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with **Liberty to act vs. Ability to act** taxonomy.
    - **Latency**: ≤ **100 ms** ensures safe control (3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **ACC Validation**: Implemented per **ISO 15622** (Performance Class I).
  - **Security**:
    - **Wi-Fi Communication**: Assumed to require **authentication/encryption** (not explicitly detailed in the text).
    - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensures event ordering in distributed systems."
]
